2605.23867.title: Human Decision-Making with Persuasive and Narrative LLM Explanations
2605.23867.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) have the potential to aid and improve human decision-making in classification tasks, not only by providing fairly accurate predictions, but also in their ability to generate cogent narrative explanations of those predictions. Prior work has demonstrated that people generally find AI narrative explanations to be understandable, trustworthy, and convincing for changing beliefs and opinions; however, less is known about the impact of narrative explanations on objective human decision-making performance. Here we conduct a large-scale human behavioral experiment to evaluate decision-making performance with LLM-generated narrative explanations of varying persuasiveness. We found the degree of persuasiveness, or lack thereof, for LLM-based explanations did not meaningfully impact decision accuracy over a simple AI prediction alone, in agreement with typical results with explainable AI based on feature importance. We found evidence that narratives increased reliance on AI, but both when the AI prediction was correct and incorrect. Exploratory analyses also indicated that the more persuasive narratives may have had a detrimental effect on decision response times and the ability to discriminate between a correct and incorrect AI prediction. Overall, this work indicates that including narrative explanations with AI predictions may involve tradeoffs for decision-making performance, and more work is needed to determine how and when narrative explanations impact human decision-making.
2605.23867.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）有潛力在分類任務中協助和改善人類的決策，不僅能提供相當準確的預測，還能生成這些預測的有說服力的敘述解釋。先前的研究表明，人們通常認為AI的敘述解釋是易於理解、值得信賴且具說服力的，能改變信念和意見；然而，關於敘述解釋對客觀人類決策表現的影響則知之甚少。在此，我們進行了一項大規模的人類行為實驗，以評估使用不同說服力的LLM生成的敘述解釋的決策表現。我們發現，LLM基礎的解釋的說服力程度，或缺乏說服力，對於決策準確性並未產生有意義的影響，這與基於特徵重要性的可解釋AI的典型結果一致。我們發現證據顯示敘述增加了對AI的依賴，但無論AI預測是正確還是錯誤。探索性分析還表明，較具說服力的敘述可能對決策反應時間和區分正確與錯誤的AI預測的能力產生了不利影響。總體而言，這項工作表明，將敘述解釋與AI預測結合可能涉及決策表現的權衡，並且需要更多的研究來確定敘述解釋如何以及何時影響人類決策。
2605.23867.author: Laura R. Marusich et.al.
2605.23867.authors: Laura R. Marusich, Mary Grace Kozuch Dhooghe, Jonathan Z. Bakdash, Murat Kantarcioglu
